appliedUpdates.description: No manifest change applied; existing api-validation stop command already handles port 3102 cleanup, so the observation remains documented but did not require an additive services.yaml update.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Tighten scrutiny/review guidance so worker success handoffs must reference a feature-attributable diff or explicit cancellation state, preventing unrelated HEAD commits from being reported as completed feature work.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Worker transcript session `46f683f5-39ae-4d91-968b-05cb66023575` contains only reads plus validator reruns, then `EndFeatureRun` reports success with commit `ab66a27ce63c7bb9cc8fc4172472212b35f39396`; `git show ab66a27` changes only `src/modules/exchanges.ts` and `tests/exchange-surface-parity.test.ts`.

rejectedObservations.observation: The original worker had to reverse-engineer that persisted Binance ticker data can contain duplicate `base/target` rows with different canonical `coin_id` values and that emitted ticker ordering follows persisted USD volume ranking after deduplication. That repository-specific exchange baseline is still not captured in the repo-local worker library.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous/non-blocking and not applied during this scrutiny run

orchestratorOverride.reason: Validators are green and the only remaining scrutiny failure was a stale failed review tied to cancelled placeholder feature `baseline-invalid-params-timeout-hardening`. The actual shipped timeout hardening is tracked by `baseline-invalid-params-timeout-rerun-hardening`, so baseline-stability scrutiny is accepted as passed.
